title: solanum tenuipes var. tenuipes
intro: Solanum tenuipes var. tenuipes is a plant species commonly referred to as the 'Wild Potato' or 'Chinese Wild Potato'. The plant is known for its edible tubers and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Solanum tenuipes var. tenuipes include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers can be dried and made into teas or infusions, or used as a raw ingredient in traditional Chinese remedies such as tonics and decoctions.
